---
title: "Analysis"
---

This section contains statistical analysis reports as followings:

1. Descriptive statistics and visualizations: 
    - [Simulated Reflectances](sim_data.qmd)
    - [ISSA Skin Reflectance](../notebooks/issa_data.ipynb)

2. Reflectance spectrum filter: 
    - [Skin Reflectance Spectra Filter](../notebooks/spectra_filter.ipynb)
    - [Analysis of Skin Reflectance Spectra Filter](../notebooks/spectra_params.ipynb)

3. Shape analysis:
    - [Shape Analysis of Skin Reflectance Spectra](../notebooks/shape.ipynb)

4. Bayesian varying coefficient models:
    - [Bayesian Varying Coefficient Models for Skin Reflectance](../notebooks/bvcm.ipynb)
